title: Stackable Strawberry Planter – Tiered Vertical Garden Pots for Herbs, Flowers & Vegetables – Space-Saving Planter for Patio, Balcony & Garden – Indoor & Outdoor | Black, 6-Tier
features: SPACE-SAVING VERTICAL PLANTER: Maximise growing space with this tiered stackable strawberry planter for balconies, patios, small gardens and greenhouses, designed with a vertical layout to keep strawberries, herbs, flowers and vegetables neatly organised.

DURABLE WEATHER-RESISTANT PLASTIC: Made from strong, lightweight plastic for year-round indoor and outdoor use, these tiered garden pots are sturdy, reusable and built to withstand outdoor conditions.
SMART DRAINAGE SYSTEM: Each tier features three drainage ports to help prevent overwatering while maintaining balanced soil moisture for healthier root development and plant growth.
MULTIPURPOSE GROWING SOLUTION: Ideal for strawberries, herbs, flowers, salad leaves, vegetables and succulents. The raised vertical design helps reduce exposure to soil pests and slugs.
STACKING DESIGN: Secure stacking planter system requires no tools for set up; configure as 1-tier, 3-tier or 6-tier, or separate into individual plant pots for flexible gardening.
SPECIFICATION: Available Options: 1-Tier (H 12cm) | 3-Tier (H 36cm) | 6-Tier (H 72cm) Width: 35cm | Depth: 26cm | Use: Indoor & Outdoor | Colour: Black, Terracotta or Grey
description: Product Description Stackable Strawberry Planters | 1, 3, or 6-Tier: Black, Terracotta or Grey Grow fresh produce at home with this Stackable Strawberry Planter – a space-saving vertical garden solution ideal for patios, balconies, small gardens and greenhouses. Designed as a tiered plant pot system, it allows you to grow strawberries, herbs, flowers, salad leaves and vegetables in one compact planter. The vertical design maximises growing space while keeping plants organised and easy to maintain. Available in Black or Terracotta and supplied in 1-tier , 3-tier or 6-tier options, these compact, durable plastic garden planters are suitable for indoor and outdoor use. KEY FEATURES ✓ Stackable Vertical Planter: Available in 1-tier, 3-tier or 6-tier options. Each layer stacks securely to create a stable vertical growing system – ideal for small gardens, patios and balconies. ✓ 3 Planting Pockets Per Tier: Grow multiple plants per level, perfect for strawberries, herbs, salad leaves, flowers and trailing plants. ✓ Durable Weather-Resistant Plastic: Strong, lightweight and built for year-round indoor or outdoor gardening. ✓ Built-In Drainage System: Three integrated drainage ports per pot help prevent overwatering while maintaining healthy soil moisture. ✓ Ideal for Small Spaces: Perfect for balcony gardening, patio planters, greenhouse growing and compact urban gardens. ✓ Raised Tiered Design: Reduces exposure to soil pests and slugs compared to traditional ground planting. ✓ Colour Options: Choose from classic Black, traditional Terracotta, or modern Grey to perfectly complement your outdoor décor. Specification 1-Tier: (H) 12cm x (W) 35cm x (D) 26cm 3-Tier: (H) 36cm x (W) 35cm x (D) 26cm 6-Tier: (H) 72cm x (W) 35cm x (D) 26cm Material: Durable Weather-Resistant Plastic Use: Indoor & Outdoor Gardening Suitable For: Strawberries, Herbs, Flowers, Salad Leaves, Vegetables & Succulents Colour Options: Black, Terracotta or Grey
